name: Bordighera
character: round pebble, largest free beach in far Ponente
blurb: Rattaconigli is the largest and most genuinely free beach in the far-Ponente band, with round pebble and Lungomare Argentina promenade running alongside it. Via Arziglia offers a second free option nearby. At 75 minutes from Finale this is a full-day commitment, so it works best when combined with the casino or Art Nouveau promenade.
